step_dist.zigzag_source: Sierra Chart Zig Zag Line Length (abs, HL-based, 5.25 pt reversal)
step_dist.note: Computed from completed RTH zigzag swing lengths

add_dist.note: AddDist < StepDist transfers ticks from loss to profit on adds

seed_dist.note: Decoupled from StepDist. 15 pts optimal from Step 3.

session.note: 10:00 start skips Open block (NPF=0.83, 29.6% cap-walk rate)

speedread_filter.note: 50-tick rolling avg of SpeedRead composite. Both seed and reversal filtered. Rev SR is the primary driver (+10% NPF).

recommended_phase_2_5.name: max_cap_walks_per_cycle
recommended_phase_2_5.reason: CW>=2 cycles average -248 to -980 ticks. Requires simulator modification.

recommended_phase_2_5.name: adaptive_cycle_stop
recommended_phase_2_5.reason: Flatten when MAE > 2.5 * rolling zigzag std. Requires simulator-level real-time MAE tracking.
recommended_phase_2_5.estimated_impact: Significant tail-risk reduction. Post-hoc estimates optimistic.

rejected.max_daily_loss: Too aggressive. Even -250t stop kills NPF to 1.08 and forfeits 875 cycles.

feature_filters.note: 16/17 features pass 3% threshold but quintile patterns are non-monotonic and overfitting risk is high on 59 sessions. Features identified for future investigation but not frozen into V1.4.

rolling_computations_for_cpp.note: TWO separate rolling computations, different studies, different windows, different data sources.

computation_1_zigzag_regime.input: Completed RTH zigzag leg distances (abs, from Sierra Chart Zig Zag study)
computation_1_zigzag_regime.data_source: Sierra Chart Zig Zag Line Length study column
